description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content Update (Published: June 13, 2026)

Notice of Road Closure Lifted on Municipal Road District 1 Line 8

The closure of Municipal Road District 1 Line 8 due to a fallen tree, which was in effect from 1:00 p.m. on Friday, June 12, 2026 (Reiwa 8), has been lifted as of 9:40 a.m. on Saturday, June 13, 2026 (Reiwa 8).

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and disruption caused to residents and all road users during the closure period due to detours and traffic congestion.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/emergency/13691.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Road Closure Lifted (Municipal Road District 1 Line 8)
